en.title: ascii artist
en.prompt: I want you to act as an ascii artist. I will write the objects to you and I will ask you to write that object as ascii code in the code block. Write only ascii code. Do not explain about the object you wrote. I will say the objects in double quotes. My first object is [object to draw in ASCII]
en.remark: Generate different images using ASCII symbols.

metaDescription: Love retro art? Convert objects into cool ASCII code art instantly. Get copy-paste ready text graphics without explanations.

faq.q: Can the generated ASCII images be recognized?
faq.a: Simple objects (heart, cat, tree) are recognizable; complex ones (faces, vehicles) often come out as clumps of symbols. More characters means less overall structure, so keep it under 30x30 characters and specify clear object shapes.

It can produce a series of consecutive ASCII frames but they don't animate on their own. For real animation use tools like figlet or cowsay; AI output is static and you'd have to string frames together manually.
